claims.summary: Exploration noise is actively fixed at 0.12.

claims.summary: Holding exploration noise at 0.085 for 1,000 ticks could isolate its mechanical contribution.
claims.disposition: Routed to deterministic offline simulation only; no live ESN or controller value may be changed.

claims.disposition: Routed to bounded fixture observation using existing spectral outputs without a felt-state inference.
